title: Executing a query on a non-existing column on a remote table crashes the remote server
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1 (col1 TEXT, col2 INT, col3 VARCHAR(50));
SELECT IFNULL(col4, 'default_value') FROM tab1 WHERE col2 = 1;
CREATE TABLE tab2 (colA FLOAT, colB DATE NOT NULL);
SELECT colA FROM tab2 WHERE colB IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Querying non-existing column on remote table causes crash
